feature2_desc: Every week our café is dressed with fresh arrangements sourced from local Texas flower growers — seasonal, fragrant, and beautifully alive.
feature1_desc: We roast in small batches and dial every espresso shot by hand. From our Corpus Blend to single-origins, each cup is crafted to be memorable.
gallery_heading: A place to slow down & breathe
hero_description: Blooms and Brew is a coffee shop in Corpus Christi, TX, serving handcrafted drinks alongside fresh flowers and curated bouquets. Stop in for your daily coffee, find the perfect blooms, and enjoy a welcoming space designed to brighten your day.
